channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Python (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Python nel periodo monthly.

item.description:
👤 Owner: aeromomo

📝 Repository: aeromomo/claw-compactor

📄 Descrizione: 🦞 LLM Token Compression & Reduction Tool — Cut AI agent token costs by up to 97%. 6-layer deterministic context compression for AI agent workspaces. No LLM required. Prompt compression, context window optimization & cost reduction for any LLM pipeline.

🍴 Forks: 124

💻 Linguaggio: Python

item.title: 🐍 FireRedTeam/FireRed-OpenStoryline (840 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: FireRedTeam

📝 Repository: FireRedTeam/FireRed-OpenStoryline

📄 Descrizione: FireRed-OpenStoryline is an AI video editing agent that transforms manual editing into intention-driven directing through natural language interaction, LLM-powered planning, and precise tool orchestration. It facilitates transparent, human-in-the-loop creation with reusable Style Skills for consistent, professional storytelling.

item.title: 🐍 OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS (823 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: OpenMOSS

📝 Repository: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS

📄 Descrizione: MOSS‑TTS Family is an open‑source speech and sound generation model family from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. It is designed for high‑fidelity, high‑expressiveness, and complex real‑world scenarios, covering stable long‑form speech, multi‑speaker dialogue, voice/character design, environmental sound effects, and real‑time streaming TTS.

⭐ Stelle: 823

🍴 Forks: 73

💻 Linguaggio: Python
